creator: tkato432@yahoo.com
text:
Well, it does not seem that coccinelle always require menhir as build
dep unless source files are modified. It is certainly true that
devel/coccinelle port fails to build if devel/menhir port with this
patch is installed, however.

In addition, coccinelle has already been upgraded to 1.0.4 on upstream,
which appears compatible with both existing and the latest versions of
menhir.
